text:
The general goal is to build a system that makes source code comments more interactive, in a safe and secure way.

Alternatively, it could be seen as an editor-agnostic plugin system.

elements.text:
The general goal is to build a system that makes source code comments more interactive, in a safe and secure way.

Alternatively, it could be seen as an editor-agnostic plugin system.

text: I've also got another one related to making comments more useful: <https://github.com/flywhl/anot|anot>. It just extracts structured data from comments. Intended to be a building block for other tools (incl. codeline, probably).
